summary: Full backend + frontend testing of QuickTurf Turf Owner Dashboard 6 new features. All 11 backend API tests pass. All frontend flows verified working.

minor.issue: Login API uses 'identifier' field, not 'username' - different from test_credentials expectation. Works correctly with 'identifier'.

issues: Slot prices shown as ₹1000 in slots but turf pricePerHour is ₹1500 - possible stale slot data

critical_code_review_comments: Login API body uses field 'identifier' not 'username' - test_credentials.md should note this
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new features tested: Analytics, Edit Turf, Reviews, Bookings (empty state), Slots, Pricing. Login uses identifier field. Owner turf id is 'owner-turf-seed-owner-1'. Backend test at /app/backend/tests/test_owner_features.py covers all APIs.

frontend.analytics_tab_kpi_cards: PASS - Total Revenue, Total Bookings, Cancelled, Occupancy Rate
frontend.edit_turf_pre_filled_form: PASS - Name, Address, Price(1500), Operating Hours(08:00-20:00), Amenities
frontend.slots_tab: PASS - date bar and time slots visible
